apple_app_store.description:
MenuSafe uses AI to instantly analyze restaurant menus and identify dishes safe for your dietary needs.

SIMPLY SCAN ANY MENU
Take a photo of any restaurant menu - printed, digital, or handwritten. Our advanced AI reads and analyzes every dish in seconds.

PERSONALIZED FOR YOUR DIET
Set up your dietary profile once with 25+ restrictions including:
• Food allergies (nuts, shellfish, eggs, soy)
• Intolerances (gluten, lactose, FODMAP)
• Lifestyle diets (vegan, vegetarian, keto, halal, kosher)

INSTANT SAFETY RATINGS
Each dish gets a clear rating:
• Safe - Enjoy without worry
• Caution - May contain traces
• Avoid - Contains your restrictions

BUILD YOUR RESTAURANT GUIDE
Save your favorite restaurants with personalized safety scores. See which places are best for your diet at a glance.

KEY FEATURES
• AI-powered menu analysis
• 25+ dietary restrictions
• Offline access to saved scans
• Restaurant rankings
• Share-friendly results
• Dark mode support

DISCLAIMER
MenuSafe is a helpful tool but should not replace communication with restaurant staff about your allergies. Always verify ingredients directly for severe allergies.
apple_app_store.promotional_text: Scan any menu. Know what's safe. Eat with confidence.
apple_app_store.whats_new:
Welcome to MenuSafe! This initial release includes:
• AI-powered menu scanning
• Support for 25+ dietary restrictions
• Restaurant saving and ranking
• Offline access to your scans

google_play_store.short_description: AI menu scanner for food allergies. Scan any menu to find safe dishes for your diet.
google_play_store.full_description: MenuSafe uses AI to instantly analyze restaurant menus and identify dishes safe for your dietary needs. SIMPLY SCAN ANY MENU Take a photo of any restaurant menu - printed, digital, or handwritten. Our advanced AI reads and analyzes every dish in seconds. PERSONALIZED FOR YOUR DIET Set up your dietary profile once with 25+ restrictions including: • Food allergies (nuts, shellfish, eggs, soy) • Intolerances (gluten, lactose, FODMAP) • Lifestyle diets (vegan, vegetarian, keto, halal, kosher) INSTANT SAFETY RATINGS Each dish gets a clear rating: ✓ Safe - Enjoy without worry ⚠ Caution - May contain traces ✗ Avoid - Contains your restrictions BUILD YOUR RESTAURANT GUIDE Save your favorite restaurants with personalized safety scores. See which places are best for your diet at a glance. KEY FEATURES • AI-powered menu analysis • 25+ dietary restrictions • Offline access to saved scans • Restaurant rankings • Share-friendly results • Dark mode support DISCLAIMER MenuSafe is a helpful tool but should not replace communication with restaurant staff about your allergies. Always verify ingredients directly for severe allergies.

descriptions: See safety ratings for every dish

ios.description: MenuSafe needs camera access to scan restaurant menus and identify safe dishes for your dietary needs.
MenuSafe needs photo library access to let you select menu images from your photos.

android.description: Required to select menu images from gallery
Required to analyze menus using AI

review_notes.notes:
1. Create an account or use demo credentials
2. Set dietary restrictions in Settings (e.g., select 'Gluten' and 'Dairy')
3. Go to Scan and take a photo of any restaurant menu
4. View the analysis showing safe/caution/avoid ratings
5. Save restaurants to see rankings based on your diet
